phases.name: Data Pipeline & Infrastructure

It encompasses a core data processing system, including testing and documentation, alongside key components for backend service management.

phases.name: Development & Refinement
phases.description: This repository represents a phased approach to developing and refining the core components of Nominate.ai. It begins with a foundational Python application (`cbapp`) and gradually builds upon it with improvements to the ChatRequest application (`cbpublic`), the system for managing applications (`system`), and the CBAP data library (`cbdistricts`). The focus is on improving stability, functionality, and code quality through iterative commits and small, focused changes.

milestones.title: cbapp - Backend Service for Data Management

phases.name: Backend Infrastructure & Documentation
phases.description: This development phase encompasses the core infrastructure and documentation for the CBApp project, focusing on enhancing the backend systems and ensuring long-term maintainability. It includes crucial updates to the `cbsurveys`, `cbinfra`, and `cbdocs` repositories, representing significant work in maintaining and improving the codebase for a complex data management system. The `cbmesh` repository is also included, contributing to the overall observability of the system.

phases.name: Core Infrastructure & API Development
phases.description: This repository represents the foundational development of the Nominate-AI platform, encompassing the core intelligence API infrastructure, the `cbproject` TypeScript application, and the authentication library for `campaignbrain.dev`. It’s a phased evolution of these critical components, ensuring stability and scalability for the platform’s operations.

The focus is on establishing a robust and scalable foundation for the platform’s future evolution.

phases.description: This repository represents the iterative development process of Campaign Brain, encompassing the creation and refinement of key components like the nomination AI service, its associated tools, and its data infrastructure. It covers the core functionality and ongoing maintenance of the system, driving advancements in efficiency and coverage.

phases.name: Core Infrastructure & Data Pipelines
phases.description: This repository represents the foundational infrastructure and data pipelines required for the Nominate-AI platform. It encompasses essential components like the Campaign Brain System Manager, the `cbwebhook` service, the issue tracking dashboard, the VPN API, and the social media integration. These elements are crucial for the platform’s functionality and data management.

phases.name: Campaign Management & Infrastructure
phases.description: This repository represents the core development and refinement of the Nominate-AI platform’s infrastructure and tooling. It encompasses the creation of key components like the Campaign Brain catalog, cbnetwork (VPN/Tor toolkit), CB Executive Summaries, and the various backend services like cbfront and cbpulse-ui. These efforts are geared towards streamlining the data management and operational aspects of the platform, ensuring efficient campaign management and data analysis.

milestones.title: CBPulse UI - VIP Business Intelligence Dashboard
VIP Frontend - Virgin Islands Hospitality Platform

phases.name: Development & Refinement of Radio Infrastructure Tools
phases.description: This repository represents a phased evolution of tools designed for rural AM/FM radio stations. Starting with a basic UI library for managing radio content, the project rapidly expanded into a suite of tools focused on managing openWRT routers, website development, scheduled tasks, and a generative AI backend. It reflects a continuous process of refinement and improvement across multiple functionalities.

phases.name: Data Pipeline & API Integration
phases.description: This project represents the initial stages of building a data pipeline for the `cbtts` and `cbdc` models. It focuses on integrating the models into a system for managing and processing real-time voice data, including initial infrastructure improvements and API interaction for the `cbqa` service.
